void.string: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <xsl:stylesheet version="1.0" xmlns:xalan="http://xml.apache.org/xslt" xmlns:datetime="http://exslt.org/dates-and-times" xmlns:math="http://exslt.org/math" xmlns:xsl="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform" xmlns:lxslt="http://xml.apache.org/xslt" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns:java="http://xml.apache.org/xslt/java" xmlns:set="http://exslt.org/sets" exclude-result-prefixes="xalan java lxslt" xmlns:ns3="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:ns1="http://cpbank.com/statement/GetStatement/Input" xmlns:ns2="http://cpbank.com/statement" xmlns:AppendZero="AppendZero" xmlns:EnDe="http://xml.apache.org/xslt/java" xmlns:MD5Hex="http://xml.apache.org/xslt/java" xmlns:Md5UniCode="http://xml.apache.org/xslt/java" xmlns:Remove="Remove" xmlns:ReplaceText="ReplaceText" xmlns:StringLength="StringLength" xmlns:dateConversion="dateConversion" xmlns:myext="myext" xmlns:replace="replace" xmlns:replaceStr="http://xml.apache.org/xslt/java" xmlns:rounding="rounding" xmlns:sringindex="sringindex" xmlns:strings="strings" xmlns:stringtext="stringtext" xmlns:truncateString="truncateString" extension-element-prefixes="datetime set math AppendZero EnDe MD5Hex Md5UniCode Remove ReplaceText StringLength dateConversion myext replace replaceStr rounding sringindex strings stringtext truncateString"> <xsl:import href="GLOBAL_FUNCLET_PATH"></xsl:import> <xsl:output method="xml" indent="yes" encoding="UTF-8" xalan:indent-amount="2" omit-xml-declaration="no"></xsl:output> <xsl:variable name="document" select="/"></xsl:variable> <xsl:variable name="document_Input1" select="document('Input1')"></xsl:variable> <xsl:template match="/"> <ns1:Envelope> <ns1:Body> <ns2:GetStatementRequest> <ns2:username> <xsl:value-of select="'ws.admin'"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:username> <ns2:password> <xsl:value-of select="'123Bank!'"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:password> <ns2:accountNumber> <xsl:value-of select="$document_Input1/AccountStmtRq/AccountNo"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:accountNumber> <ns2:fromDate> <xsl:value-of select="$document_Input1/AccountStmtRq/FromDate"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:fromDate> <ns2:toDate> <xsl:value-of select="$document_Input1/AccountStmtRq/ToDate"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:toDate> </ns2:GetStatementRequest> </ns1:Body> </ns1:Envelope> </xsl:template> </xsl:stylesheet>

<xsd:schema xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"> <xsd:element name="AccountStmtRq">
<xsd:complexType> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="AccountType" type="xsd:string"/>
<xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="AccountNo" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="FromDate" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="ToDate" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="LastId" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="0" name="SignData" type="xsd:string"/>
</xsd:sequence>
</xsd:complexType> </xsd:element> </xsd:schema>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <xs:schema elementFormDefault="qualified" targetNamespace="http://cpbank.com/statement" xmlns:sch="http://cpbank.com/statement" xmlns:soap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/soap/" xmlns:stat="http://cpbank.com/statement" xmlns:tns="http://cpbank.com/statement" xmlns:wsdl="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"> <!-- Request --> <xs:element name="GetStatementRequest"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="username" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element name="password" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element name="accountNumber" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="fromDate" type="stat:YYYYMMDDDate"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="toDate" type="stat:YYYYMMDDDate"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element>
<!-- Response --> <xs:element name="GetStatementResponse"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="status" type="stat:status"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="transactions" type="stat:transactionList"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element>
<!-- Status --> <xs:simpleType name="status"> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> <xs:enumeration value="SUCCESS"/> <xs:enumeration value="FAILURE"/> <xs:enumeration value="ERROR"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType>
<!-- Date Format --> <xs:simpleType name="YYYYMMDDDate"> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> <xs:pattern value="[0-9]{4}(0[1-9]|1[0-2])(0[1-9]|[12][0-9]|3[01])"/> <xs:length value="8"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType>
<!-- Transaction List --> <xs:complexType name="transactionList"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0" name="transaction" type="stat:transaction"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType>
<!-- Transaction with new fields --> <xs:complexType name="transaction"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="recid" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="bookingDate" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="reference" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="narrative" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="valueDate" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="debit" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="credit" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="currency" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="description" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="txnType" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="drCr" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="amount" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="acboCrAcc" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="acboCrName" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="acboDrName" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="acbiCrName" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="acbiDrName" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="bakongDesc" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="trxDt" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="txnTypeDescription" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="cbsCrName" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="cbsDrName" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:schema>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <xsd:schema xmlns:wsdl="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/" xmlns:tns="http://cpbank.com/statement" xmlns:sch="http://cpbank.com/statement" xmlns:soap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/soap/" xmlns:ftns="http://cpbank.com/statement/GetStatement/Input" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" targetNamespace="http://cpbank.com/statement/GetStatement/Input"> <xsd:import namespace="http://cpbank.com/statement"/> <xsd:element name="Envelope"> <xsd:complexType> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element ref="ftns:Header"/> <xsd:element ref="ftns:Body"/> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="Header"> <xsd:complexType> <xsd:sequence/> </xsd:complexType> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="Body"> <xsd:complexType> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element ref="sch:GetStatementRequest"/> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> </xsd:element> </xsd:schema>
